name: Jack in the Box Inc.
description: Jack in the Box Inc. is an American restaurant company that operates and franchises the Jack in the Box fast-food hamburger chain, known for its diverse menu and iconic mascot. Headquartered in San Diego, California, the company also owns and operates the Del Taco brand, a Mexican-American quick-service restaurant chain. With thousands of locations primarily across the United States, the company focuses on providing a wide variety of food options, including burgers, tacos, and breakfast items, while leveraging its unique brand identity to maintain a strong presence in the competitive quick-service restaurant industry.
